introSection: Roller Ball is a 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Austria. It is owned by the Austrian showmen family Kern & Waldmann.
fullText:
Roller Ball is a 4th Dimension roller coaster located at Prater in Vienna, Austria. It is owned by the Austrian showmen family Kern & Waldmann.

Track arrived onsite in October 2019.



Each row sits back-to-back.
